case_for: Diggs has been a high-target, high-volume WR1 for a pass-heavy offense, hitting 12+ points in four of his last five games including two 19+ point outputs.
case_against: His week-to-week variance is significant, as shown by the 5.8 and 7.7 point duds, meaning a poor game script or shutdown coverage could easily drag him below the threshold.
